top_signals.title: ‘We’ll keep acquiring’: Young’s sets sights on buying up dozens more London pubs
top_signals.summary: One of London’s biggest pub chains has said it wants to buy up dozens more pubs after cheering the success of recent takeovers. Young’s, which currently operates around 280 pubs across the country, has set a medium-term target of expanding its estate to 350 pubs. The group has been on a major acquisition spree over [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
